title: OccupancyStateEvent
description: Zone occupancy state transition event. Only VACANT_CONFIRMED satisfies vacancy.

previousState.description: Previous occupancy state of the zone

currentState.description: Current occupancy state of the zone

transitionReason.description: Human-readable reason for the state transition

confirmationCount.description: Number of consecutive vacancy confirmations received

OccupancyState.description: Zone occupancy states. UNKNOWN and STALE are never treated as vacancy.
